Gym & Fitness Studio Cleaning in Marietta, GA

Sparkling equipment. Fresh locker rooms. Members keep coming back.

Santos Cleaning Solutions delivers professional gym cleaning in Marietta, GA. Fully insured, background-checked teams, EPA-registered products, and flexible scheduling that fits your business.

Get a Free Quote → Call (866) 350-9407
$1M General Liability $2M Products / Completed Ops Background-checked staff Licensed & Bonded EPA-registered products

What's Included in Our Gym Cleaning Service

Every gym cleaning visit follows a written checklist tailored to your facility. No corners cut, no surprises.

  • Cardio & strength equipment sanitization
  • Free weight area & rubber floor cleaning
  • Locker room deep clean & shower disinfection
  • Mirror & glass cleaning
  • Studio floor mopping (between classes)
  • Restroom & vanity cleaning
  • Trash & towel removal
  • High-touch sanitization (door handles, cardio screens)

Compliance & Training

We use gym-safe disinfectants that won't damage rubber floors, vinyl benches, or cardio equipment touchscreens. Our team follows ISSA cleaning standards and we are fully insured.

Insurance Coverage

  • General Liability — $1,000,000 per occurrence
  • Products & Completed Operations — $2,000,000
  • Personal & Advertising Injury — $1,000,000
  • Premises Rented to You — $100,000
  • Medical Expenses — $5,000

Certificate of Insurance available on request. We can name your facility as Additional Insured at no cost.

How It Works

1. Free Walkthrough

We visit your facility, measure square footage, identify your priority areas, and listen to your specific needs.

2. Custom Quote

You receive a detailed written quote within 24 hours — no hidden fees, no surprises. Includes scope, frequency, and pricing.

3. Trial Clean (Optional)

Want to see us in action first? We offer a one-time trial clean before any contract is signed. Zero risk.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can you clean while we are open?

We offer overnight cleaning (10 PM–5 AM) to avoid disrupting members. Day porter service available for boutique studios that need touch-ups between classes.

Do you handle locker rooms and showers?

Yes — full deep cleaning including shower tile descaling, mold prevention, and locker disinfection. Mold-resistant treatment available.

What about boutique studios with no shower?

We offer simplified packages starting at $400/month for studios under 2,000 sqft.

How often should a gym be cleaned?

Most gyms benefit from nightly service. Boutique studios can do well with 3–5x per week depending on traffic.

Are you insured?

Yes — $1M General Liability, $2M Products/Completed Operations. Certificate available on request.

Can you handle multi-location gym chains?

Absolutely. We service multi-location franchises with consolidated billing and a dedicated account manager.
